name: Sugarplums (Vegetarian)
recipeInstructions:
1. With a sharp knife, slit the dates and remove the pits.
2. In a small bowl, cream the butter with confectioners' sugar. Stir in the ground almonds and orange flower water, mixing well.
3. Using a demitasse spoon, place some almond filling in each date. Place a whole almond on the filling and gently press the sides of the date together. Some filling will be visible.
4. Roll the dates in the granulated sugar. They will keep for a few days, stored airtight between layers of wax paper.
5. Makes 2 dozen sugarplums.
